The camera moves slowly forward toward a tall rectangular skyscraper on the right as warm sunset hues illuminate the scene. [6-8] The central text fades away completely, leaving an unobstructed view, while small white text "Estimated percentages" appears in the bottom left corner. [8-10] The scene cuts to religious architecture featuring tall minarets with crescent finials surrounding a blue dome and a bell tower topped with a cross. "Beirut, Lebanon" appears centrally over the buildings. [10-12] The view cuts abruptly to a close-up of dark blue ocean waves rippling across the frame, replacing all architectural structures. [12-16] Dark blue ocean waves ripple across the screen as the white title "GENERATION 17" fades in above a multi-colored dashed line, followed by the name "Nadine Khaouli" appearing below. [16-22] The video cuts to a woman with long dark hair driving in profile, passing beige buildings and trees with pink blossoms. The perspective shifts to an exterior

[40-42] A woman with long dark hair sits on a beige sofa wearing a black denim jacket with a red sequined heart patch on the right shoulder, speaking to the camera. [42-44] The scene shifts to a blonde woman in a white top and grey pants sweeping debris on a stone pavement near dark panels and hanging green fabric. [44-48] Several individuals wearing neon yellow safety vests with black logos and Arabic text "كفي بكفك" walk up stairs and through narrow alleys carrying brown cardboard boxes and a white box with the same logo. [48-52] The video returns to the woman on the sofa, who continues speaking while facing forward.

[54-56] Two women wearing neon yellow safety vests and blue face masks pack dry goods indoors; one holds a clear plastic bag while the other uses a metal scoop to fill it with legumes near grain sacks. [56-58] A woman in a neon vest and black-and-white patterned top kneels to apply white labels featuring a blue logo and Arabic text "كفي بكفك" to a stack of brown cardboard boxes. [58-60] Five women in neon vests stand in a group; four wear masks as one holds a smartphone and the central woman gestures with her hands. [60-62] A person in a neon vest walks down a narrow, damaged hallway with charred walls, followed by a cut to a woman with long dark hair in a black denim jacket with a red heart patch speaking on a beige sofa. [62-66] The woman continues speaking directly to the camera with her arms crossed against a plain white wall background.

[70-72] Four people in neon yellow vests with Arabic text pack white grains into clear plastic bags in a warehouse; one wears a beige hijab, another a blue headband, and three wear face masks. [72-74] Several individuals in neon yellow vests walk in a line through a narrow outdoor alleyway carrying large brown cardboard boxes past weathered beige walls. [74-76] A man in a neon yellow vest and khaki shorts carries two stacked cardboard boxes displaying a blue logo and text "كفي يكفك" up concrete stairs past a wall with peeling red paint and white Arabic graffiti. [76-78] A woman with dark curly hair wearing a neon yellow safety vest and blue face mask walks through a doorway carrying a large, flat brown cardboard box. [78-80] A debris-strewn courtyard sits between damaged buildings with shattered windows and exposed wiring, where a white van is parked amidst rubble.

[82-84] A person in a neon yellow safety vest with a black logo and Arabic text "كفي بكفك" over a striped shirt swings a pickaxe at dusty ground near white sacks and buckets. [84-86] A woman with long dark hair wearing the same vest, black pants with a white side stripe, and white sneakers walks down a narrow stone alley toward a large wooden door. [86-88] A close-up profile shows the woman gazing at a blue ocean under a clear sky, sunlight illuminating her face. [88-90] The woman sits on a beige sofa facing the camera, wearing a black denim jacket with a red sequined heart patch on the shoulder and speaking.
